title: azaleastrum albiflorum subsp. warrenii
intro: Azaleastrum albiflorum subsp. warrenii, also known as the Yellow Hibiscus, is a flowering plant species in the mallow family, Malvaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, due to the presence of flavonoids and glycosides. The health benefits of Azaleastrum albiflorum subsp. warrenii include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and alleviating digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of the plant often include infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
